_meta.purpose: Foolproof ordered request bodies for OSCU eTIMS sandbox certification. Each body validated end-to-end on attempt 6 (2026-04-30, TIN P600003105A).

testWindow.phase1_apiTesting: First 1 hour — target 50 minutes for all 23 validation rows green
testWindow.phase2_completenessAndArtefacts: Remaining 2 hours — additional coverage (more sales, items, customers), screenshot capture, GavaConnect-side requirements, artefact upload
testWindow.portalDisplayFreeze: GavaConnect validation page stops visually updating after the 60-min mark; API still works for the full 3 hours

criticalRules: 1. Never re-call a green row — failed retry flips it back to red.

2. itemCd suffix is server-enforced per (ProductType+PackagingUnit+QuantityUnit). Error 'Invalid itemCd Sequence. Expected sequence ending with: ********N' tells you the next free suffix; use it verbatim.
3. sarNo is server-enforced strict-sequential. Error 'Invalid sarNo: Expected: N but found: M' tells you the next value. Failed calls can consume sarNo silently.
4. rsdQty in /save/stockMaster must equal cumulative /insertStockIO qty for that itemCd. Error tells you the expected value.
5. itemCd embeds qtyUnitCd (chars 6-7) and pkgUnitCd (chars 4-5) — must match the body fields.

6. SAVE SALES TRANSACTION foolproof: clean linear chain (saveItem → insertStockIO → saveStockMaster → sale) on a fresh never-touched itemCd. Items with prior baggage cause stockMaster's 'Successful' to not actually persist.
7. SAVE ITEM COMPOSITION foolproof: use a freshly-saved finished item with ZERO stockIO. Composition validates raw_stock >= cpstQty * finished_stock; with finished=0 it always passes.

8. SAVE PURCHASES INFORMATION foolproof: spplrTin = P052240279A (sandbox-seeded supplier), spplrInvcNo from existing range 56-60 (discovered via /selectTrnsPurchaseSalesList), itemList uses YOUR saved items.

screenshotPlan.1_ItemCreation: After step 16 saveItem (or any saveItem) succeeds, capture Postman response + GavaConnect 'SAVE ITEM' row green
screenshotPlan.2_InvoiceGeneration: After step 24 sale succeeds, capture Postman response showing intrlData/rcptSign/sdcDateTime
screenshotPlan.3_InvoiceCopy: Open https://etims-sbx.kra.go.ke/common/link/etims/receipt/indexEtimsReceiptData?Data=<tin><bhfId><rcptSign> using values from step 24 response
screenshotPlan.4_CreditNoteCopy: After step 25 credit note succeeds, capture Postman response + the corresponding etims-sbx receipt URL

timingTargets_phase2_2hr_extras.60min_clickGoLive: Click Go Live before 60-min portal freeze
timingTargets_phase2_2hr_extras.60_to_120min: Run extras tier — additional sales (anonymous, exempt), additional purchases, additional items, additional customers (extras tier). Refines completeness percentage.
timingTargets_phase2_2hr_extras.120_to_180min: Compile and upload artefacts (4 screenshots + any required test-completion certificate). Verify all uploaded. Confirm with Novascape compliance team.

_PHASE_1_TIER_1_LOOKUPS: 12 read-only routes — fastest part. Burn them in 5 min.

04_selectItemClsList.captures: data.itemClsList[*].itemClsCd — known-working: 1010151700 (Camels, taxTyCd B), 9901200000 (Zero Rated Goods, taxTyCd C)

08_selectImportItemList.captures: data.itemList[0].taskCd and data.itemList[0].dclDe — used in step 27. Attempt 6 returned taskCd=20230209029420, dclDe=01022023

12_selectTrnsPurchaseSalesList.captures: 5 sandbox-seeded supplier invoices from spplrTin P052240279A (invcNos 56-60). KEY DISCOVERY ROUTE — used in step 26 purchase.

_PHASE_1_TIER_3_ITEMS: Save 3 items at minimum. Each item pre-fills item algorithm: KE + 1or2 + pkg(2) + qty(2) + 8-digit-suffix. If 'Invalid itemCd Sequence. Expected sequence ending with N' use that N.

17_saveItem_RAW_AmoxicillinAPI.role: Raw material — used as cpstItemCd in step 21 composition

18_saveItem_FINISHED_ParacetamolTablets_.role: Sales chain item (suffix 00000002, NT/BA combo). Will be stocked-in (step 22, sarNo=2) and sold (step 24). Suffix 00000001 of same combo is reserved as composition target 2 (step 19b, zero stock).

19_saveItem_FINISHED_Effervescent_forCom.role: Composition target — the finished product whose recipe we are defining. NEVER run insertStockIO or saveStockMaster for this item. With rsdQty=0 the composition formula (raw_stock >= cpstQty × finished_stock) becomes (10 >= 1×0=0) which always passes. If you accidentally stock this item, composition will require raw_stock >= cpstQty × stocked_qty and may fail.

19b_saveItem_FINISHED_ParacetamolTablets.role: Composition target 2 — second finished product for step 21b. NEVER call insertStockIO or saveStockMaster for this item. Zero stock means formula (raw >= cpstQty × 0) always passes.

20_selectItemList.screenshot: SCREENSHOT 1 (Item Creation) — capture this response showing all saved items + the saveItem (#17) success response. Also screenshot the GavaConnect validation page row 'SAVE ITEM' green.

_PHASE_1_TIER_4_COMPOSITION: TWO compositions. EXACT order: (1) saveItem raw KE1BGKG00000001 (step 17) + saveItem comp-target-1 KE2PGBA00000003 (step 19) + saveItem comp-target-2 KE2NTBA00000004 (step 19b). (2) insertStockIO raw ONLY (step 20a, sarNo=1, qty=10). (3) saveStockMaster raw ONLY (step 20b, rsdQty=10 — MUST exactly equal step-20a qty). (4) saveItemComposition x2 (steps 21 and 21b — both use zero-stock targets so formula raw(10) >= cpstQty(1) × 0 = 0 always passes). NEVER stock the composition targets (steps 19 and 19b). NEVER mismatch rsdQty with stockIO qty — saveStockMaster silently rejects mismatches and composition then errors 'does not exist in stock master'.

20a_insertStockIO_raw_material.note: Fresh app: this is sarNo=1, the very first insertStockIO on this TIN. Step 22 (sales chain stockIO for KE2NTBA00000002) uses sarNo=2. If error says 'Expected: N but found: 1', use N verbatim.

20b_saveStockMaster_raw_material.role: Register raw material in stock master BEFORE composition. Composition validates against stock master, not stockIO directly.
20b_saveStockMaster_raw_material.CRITICAL: rsdQty MUST EXACTLY EQUAL the qty from step 20a insertStockIO. stockIO qty=10 → rsdQty=10. If you enter any other value (e.g. 20), saveStockMaster silently rejects and the item will NOT be in stock master, causing composition to fail with 'does not exist in stock master'.

21b_saveItemComposition_target2.passesValidationRow: (SAVE ITEM COMPOSITION already passed by step 21)
21b_saveItemComposition_target2.role: Second composition — links step-19b item (KE2NTBA00000004, zero stock) to same raw material. Formula: raw_rsdQty(10) >= cpstQty(1) × finished_rsdQty(0) = 0 ✓

_PHASE_1_TIER_5_SALES_CHAIN: Clean linear chain on fresh item KE2NTBA00000002: insertStockIO(sarNo=2) → saveStockMaster(rsdQty=10) → sale. sarNo=2 because fresh app only used sarNo=1 for raw material (step 20a). If error says 'Expected: N', use that N and do NOT re-run 20a.

24_insertTrnsSalesTransaction_sale1_John.screenshot: SCREENSHOT 2 (Invoice Generation) — capture response showing intrlData, rcptSign, sdcDateTime. SCREENSHOT 3 (Invoice Copy) — open https://etims-sbx.kra.go.ke/common/link/etims/receipt/indexEtimsReceiptData?Data={{tin}}{{bhfId}}{{rcptSign}} (concatenate values).

_PHASE_1_TIER_6_CREDIT_NOTE: Refund of Sale 1. rcptTyCd=R, orgInvcNo=1, rfdRsnCd=01. itemList qty MUST BE POSITIVE (1, not -1) — rcptTyCd:R already tells the server it is a return. Only the monetary amounts (splyAmt, taxblAmt, taxAmt, totAmt) are negative. Sending qty=-1 causes error 'You cannot sell 0 qty'.

25_insertTrnsSalesTransaction_creditNote.screenshot: SCREENSHOT 4 (Credit Note Copy) — capture response with rcptTyCd:R, negative amounts. Open https://etims-sbx.kra.go.ke/common/link/etims/receipt/indexEtimsReceiptData?Data={{tin}}{{bhfId}}{{creditNoteRcptSign}} for the rendered credit note.

_PHASE_1_TIER_7_PURCHASE: Sandbox supplier P052240279A + existing invoice 56-60 + YOUR own item.

26_insertTrnsPurchase_spplrInvcNo_from_s.runtimeFill: spplrInvcNo MUST come from step 12 response (selectTrnsPurchaseSalesList). Read data.saleList[0].spplrInvcNo from step 12 and use it. Invoice numbers shift each test session: was 56-60 (Apr 30), was 61-65 (May 4). Never hardcode.

_PHASE_1_TIER_8_IMPORTED_ITEM_UPDATE: Use taskCd/dclDe captured in step 08. Reference your saved raw itemCd from step 17.

27_updateImportItem.runtimeFill: taskCd and dclDe MUST come from step 08 response (selectImportItemList). Use data.itemList[0].taskCd and data.itemList[0].dclDe. taskCd changes every session: was 20230209029420 (Apr 30), is 20230209029453 (May 4). Never hardcode.

_PHASE_2_EXTRAS_HOUR2_AND_HOUR3: Optional but recommended for completeness. These calls do not flip new validation rows (they re-hit the same routes from phase 1) — they enrich your transaction history for the artefact-upload phase. Run after Go Live (step 27 done, all rows green).

EXTRA_28_saveBhfCustomer_MARY_CLINICS.purpose: Second customer for variety in sales artefacts

EXTRA_29_saveItem_finished_capsules.purpose: Additional finished product (NT/BA combo, suffix 00000003). If server rejects suffix, use value from error message.

EXTRA_30_saveItem_finished_paracetamol.purpose: Additional finished product — extra paracetamol tabs (NT/BA combo, suffix 00000004). If server rejects suffix, use value from error message.

EXTRA_31_insertStockIO_capsules.purpose: Stock-in capsules. sarNo=3 on a fresh app (raw=1, paracetamol=2 consumed by step 22). ALWAYS use the 'Expected: N' value from any sarNo error.

EXTRA_32_saveStockMaster_capsules.purpose: Register capsules stock master — rsdQty=100 matches step 31 stockIO

EXTRA_33_insertStockIO_paracetamol.purpose: Stock-in extra paracetamol. sarNo=4 on a fresh app (raw=1, paracetamol=2, capsules=3 consumed). Use error message value if different.

EXTRA_34_saveStockMaster_paracetamol.purpose: Register paracetamol stock master — rsdQty=100 matches step 33

EXTRA_35_insertTrnsSalesTransaction_sale.purpose: Sale 2 — MARY CLINICS, Paracetamol, full receipt details

EXTRA_36_insertTrnsSalesTransaction_sale.purpose: Sale 3 — anonymous walk-in (custTin null), Capsules, taxTyCd B

EXTRA_37_insertTrnsPurchase_invoice57.purpose: Second purchase — different sandbox invoice number 57, references your capsules

EXTRA_38_selectStockMoveList_afterMoveme.purpose: Re-query stock movements — now returns rich data after stockIO + sales activity. Useful for screenshots showing inventory tracking is working.

EXTRA_39_selectInvoiceDetails_afterSale1.purpose: Re-query invoice details for invcNo=1 (the sale 1 from step 24) — returns full invoice payload for the rendered receipt screenshot

EXTRA_40_selectTrnsSalesList_afterSales.purpose: Re-query sales list — now shows your 3 sales + credit note for verification

23_routes_passing_in_phase_1: Row OSCU INITIALIZATION → step 02
Row LOOK UP LIST OF CODE → step 03
Row LOOK UP ITEM CLASSIFICATION → step 04
Row LOOK UP BRANCH LIST → step 05
Row LOOK UP NOTICES LIST → step 06
Row LOOK UP TAX PAYER INFO → step 07
Row LOOK UP IMPORTED ITEM LIST → step 08
Row LOOK UP STOCK MOVEMENT → step 09
Row LOOK UP INVOICE DETAILS → step 10
Row LOOK UP TRANSACTION SALES LIST → step 11
Row LOOK UP PURCHASES SALES LIST → step 12
Row SAVE CUSTOMER BRANCH → step 13
Row LOOK UP CUSTOMER LIST → step 14
Row SAVE BRANCH USER ACCOUNT → step 15
Row SAVE BRANCH INSURANCES → step 16
Row SAVE ITEM → step 17 (or 18, 19)
Row LOOK UP PRODUCT LIST → step 20
Row SAVE ITEM COMPOSITION → step 21 (step 21b adds second composition, same row stays green)
Row SAVE STOCK IN/OUT → step 20a (raw material stockIO, sarNo=1) — step 22 (paracetamol, sarNo=2 on fresh app) keeps it green
Row SAVE STOCK MASTER INFORMATION → step 23
Row SAVE SALES TRANSACTION → step 24 (credit note step 25 keeps it green)
Row SAVE PURCHASES INFORMATION → step 26
Row UPDATE IMPORTED ITEMS → step 27

_NEVER_DO: Never re-call a green row with a body that may error — the row flips back to red.

Never use negative qty in a credit note itemList — qty must be POSITIVE (e.g. 1, not -1). The rcptTyCd:'R' tells the server it is a return; only the monetary amounts (splyAmt, taxblAmt, taxAmt, totAmt) should be negative. Negative qty causes error 'You cannot sell 0 qty'.

Never call extra /save/stockMaster or /insertStockIO between an item's initial save chain and its first sale — that breaks stockMaster persistence and the sale rejects 'does not exist in stock master'.
Never hardcode spplrInvcNo — must query /selectTrnsPurchaseSalesList (step 12) first each session and use the first returned spplrInvcNo. Invoice range shifts per session (was 56-60, became 61-65).
Never hardcode taskCd in /updateImportItem — must query /selectImportItemList (step 08) first each session and use data.itemList[0].taskCd. taskCd changes per session.
Never run composition (step 21) before stocking-in the raw material (step 20a) AND registering it in stock master (step 20b) — composition validates against stock MASTER, not stockIO alone.

Never enter a rsdQty in saveStockMaster that differs from the cumulative insertStockIO qty for that item. Mismatch causes saveStockMaster to silently fail and the item will be absent from stock master — causing composition to report 'does not exist in stock master'.
Never call insertStockIO or saveStockMaster for the composition target item (step 19 KE2PGBA) — it must stay at 0 stock so the formula (raw_stock >= cpstQty × 0) always passes.
Never try to save items with non-standard itemCd format (e.g., supplier's KE1NTXU prefix where qtyUnitCd 'XU' isn't valid 2-char code) — qtyUnitCd validation rejects them.
Never guess sarNo or rsdQty — read the error message which tells you the expected value and use it verbatim.
